posts.title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training
AI Weekly Issue #486: Apple is replacing Tim Cook because of AI
posts.summary: Apple handed the next decade to a silicon engineer. Bezos hit $38B in five months. Brin came out of retirement to code. When the founders stop delegating AI, the stakes have passed the point of no return.
